---
title: "Malformation Analysis"
author: "Ryan Taylor"
format: 
  html:
    theme: paper
    highlight: haddock
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-overflow: wrap
    df-print: kable
    knitr:
      opts_chunk:
        echo: true,
        include: true
        message: false,
        warning: false
        results: markup
        fig.align: center
        fig.height: 5
        fig.width: 7
        R.options:
          scipen: 999
          knitr.kable.NA: ""
editor: source
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# Clear memory
rm(list = ls()); gc()

# Load packages
# if(!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(
  # Specialty
  itsadug, SimpleITK,
  
  # Format
  latex2exp, table1, gtsummary,
  broom.helpers, broom.mixed,
  
  # Modeling
  mgcv,
  
  # Useful extensions
  gtools, readxl,
  
  # Basics
  DescTools, tidyverse, magrittr, janitor, glue, skimr,
  knitr, kableExtra, ggpubr, ggpmisc
)

# Make it easier to turn answers into rounded text 
PrintNum <- function(x, acc = 0.01, percent = F, vec = F){
  if(percent){ 
    y <- scales::label_percent(accuracy = acc)(x)
  } else {
    y <- scales::label_number(accuracy = acc)(x)
  }
  if(vec)( y <- paste0("(",
                       paste(y, collapse = ", "),
                       ")"))
  return(y)
}
```

# Load data
